productDisplayName: Fila Men Driving Velcro Black Casual Shoes
description: For all your motorsport lovers and those who enjoy those long drives in your four-wheelers, the fila Driving Velcro shoe is a great buy. With cushioned comfort and a stylish looks, this shoe is all set to make driving all the more fun.UpperSynthetic leather upper with a nubuck overlay around the forefoot for maximum comfort, durability and styleMidfoot velcro closures for a customised FitMeshed and padded tongue and collar for all-day breathable comfortCushioned footbed with meshed fabric lining for sweat-free all-day comfortMidsolePhylon midsole for lightweight comfortOutsoleFlat TPR outsole with grooves in lines and circles in the forefoot and semi-circular terraced lugs on the heel for easy movement of the foot between pedalsShoe careWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dustDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
